title: Offenses Evidencing Prejudice
summary: Expanding grounds for the reclassification of offenses to include acts based on the gender or gender identity of any person; requiring that the reclassification occur if the offense was based in whole or in part on specified characteristics of any person; replacing the term "mental or physical disability" with the term "disability" and revising the definition; requiring that the reclassification of a certain offense occur if the offense was based in whole or in part on a disability of any person, etc.

actions.action: Referred to Criminal Justice; Appropriations Committee on Criminal and Civil Justice; Fiscal Policy
